title: aicm config
description: Configuration for the aicm commit message generator.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for editor support.

provider.description: Agent provider used to generate commit messages.

model.description: Model name passed to the selected provider. If omitted, a provider-specific default is used.

effort.description: Reasoning effort passed to the selected provider. If omitted, provider-specific defaults are used: codex uses none, claude uses low, and ollama ignores effort.

output.description: Output mode for the generated commit message.

ollamaHost.description: Ollama server URL. Used only when provider is ollama.

prompt.description: Inline prompt for commit message generation. Takes precedence over promptFile.

promptFile.description: Path to a prompt file. Relative paths are resolved from the repository root.
